en.atmosphere: Quiet neighborhood. Note high seismic risk. Mixed vibe.
en.landmarks: Decent parks (188k sqm). Nature pockets scattered.
en.food: 61 restaurants, mostly Japanese chains. Few standouts.
en.nightlife: Active izakaya scene (26 late spots). Karaoke sparse.

ja.atmosphere: 静かな地域。朝夕の時間帯に混雑。
ja.food: 飲食店61軒。チェーン多め。地元店少ない。
ja.nightlife: 夜間営業26軒。11時過ぎ静か。
